고린도후서 9:1.content: It is indeed unnecessary for me to write to you concerning the service to the saints,

고린도후서 9:2.content: for I know your readiness, of which I boast on your behalf to those of Macedonia, that Achaia has been prepared for the past year. Your zeal has stirred up very many of them.

고린도후서 9:3.content: But I have sent the brothers that our boasting on your behalf may not be in vain in this respect, that, just as I said, you may be prepared,

고린도후서 9:4.content: lest by any means, if anyone from Macedonia comes there with me and finds you unprepared, we (to say nothing of you) would be disappointed in this confident boasting.

고린도후서 9:5.content: I thought it necessary therefore to entreat the brothers that they would go before to you and arrange ahead of time the generous gift that you promised before, that the same might be ready as a matter of generosity, and not of greediness.

고린도후서 9:6.content: Remember this: he who sows sparingly will also reap sparingly. He who sows bountifully will also reap bountifully.

고린도후서 9:7.content: Let each man give according as he has determined in his heart, not grudgingly or under compulsion, for God loves a cheerful giver.

고린도후서 9:8.content: And God is able to make all grace abound to you, that you, always having all sufficiency in everything, may abound to every good work.

고린도후서 9:9.content: As it is written, “He has scattered abroad. He has given to the poor. His righteousness remains forever.”

고린도후서 9:10.content: Now may he who supplies seed to the sower and bread for food, supply and multiply your seed for sowing, and increase the fruits of your righteousness,

고린도후서 9:11.content: you being enriched in everything to all generosity, which produces thanksgiving to God through us.

고린도후서 9:12.content: For this service of giving that you perform not only makes up for lack among the saints, but abounds also through much giving of thanks to God,

고린도후서 9:13.content: seeing that through the proof given by this service, they glorify God for the obedience of your confession to the Good News of Christ and for the generosity of your contribution to them and to all,

고린도후서 9:14.content: while they themselves also, with supplication on your behalf, yearn for you by reason of the exceeding grace of God in you.

고린도후서 9:15.content: Now thanks be to God for his unspeakable gift!
